candidates.label: Hashtagized closing remarks
candidates.description: Posts that conclude with one or more short hashtags after a brief statement.

citations.text: It’s 4:59. Do you know where your margarita is? #margarita #margaritamondayontuesday

candidates.scope_note: Observed within this batch; not a general rule.
candidates.boundary_note: Some posts use longer hashtags or embed them mid-sentence.

candidates.label: Birthday greeting with name and exclamation
candidates.description: Posts that greet someone on their birthday using the person’s name and a celebratory punctuation.
candidates.scope_note: Limited to birthday posts in this batch.
candidates.boundary_note: Some birthday wishes omit the name or punctuation.

candidates.label: Drink‑reference posts with ingredient lists
candidates.description: Posts that mention a specific alcoholic beverage and list its ingredients separated by commas.

citations.text: It’s 4:59 somewhere. Tiki bowl: Juice, juice, rum, rum, rum, honey, bitters. #tiki #tikibowl #459
It’s 4:59. Do you know where your margarita is? #margarita #margaritamondayontuesday

candidates.scope_note: Observed in posts that reference drinks within this batch.
candidates.boundary_note: Other beverage mentions lack ingredient detail or use non‑alcoholic drinks.
